nodes.label: AI as polishing tool for communication
nodes.label_negative: Manual drafting and anxiety over wording
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use chat gpt to polish up what I am already creating

nodes.label: AI as research assistant for nuanced details
nodes.grounding_span: I'm looking for things about their childhood and where they were raised and their first jobs

nodes.label: AI as delegation tool for routine tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as collaborative partner throughout task
nodes.grounding_span: I am much more likely to delegate

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: when it hullacinates when i do research

nodes.label: AI integration into existing workflows
nodes.grounding_span: I think my relationship with AI will become more seamless

nodes.label: Human collaboration and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy working with other people. I enjoy learning new things. I don't want to give those up

nodes.label: Professional confidence and reduced anxiety
nodes.grounding_span: It takes the anxiety out of it for me

nodes.label: Deep contextual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: find more nuanced, new ideas, than a comprehensive view of all the ideas

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: outsource the gritty back and forth of scheduling to maximize the meaningful conversations

nodes.label: Trustworthy information
nodes.grounding_span: when it hullacinates when i do research

nodes.label: Meaningful human connection and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy working with other people. I enjoy learning new things

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email polishing
nodes.grounding_span: I really like using it to polish up some emails

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination and stuckness
nodes.grounding_span: i often get frustrated when it can't create what i want

nodes.label: Optimism about future seamless integration
nodes.grounding_span: I think my relationship with AI will become more seamless

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing human interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to give those up

nodes.label: Mind dump and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I do a mind dump, where I talk about everything i am doing for 5 - 10 minutes and then have it create a summary

nodes.label: Preference for conversational discovery over comprehensive reports
nodes.grounding_span: I would much rather have a conversational research (with deep research capability, where it can take its time to reason) with a chatbot, than just one comprehensive deep research report
